metadata.name: OTCFinUtils
metadata.summary: Useful functions to interact with dataverse and sharepoint

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading._extract_key_api_params
documentation:
Helper function for creating appropriate DV API parameters
from the provided id parameters.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading._extract_batch_response_objects
documentation: A general helper function. Can be used for any type of batch response.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading._extract_object_ids
documentation:
Returns a list of IDs from a list of json response objects.
Uses the id-parameters-buffer to check the form of the object.

If it's a lookup-key, the id will be in a different location,
than if it were a regular key.

If the entity is new, return None.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading._extract_object_lookups
documentation: Helper function for getting the lookups from the batch responses.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading._extract_curr_object_lookups
documentation:
Helper function. One entity can have multiple lookups. Because of this,
it's better to group this logic into a separate function.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading.get_buffer_lookups
documentation:
Uses the provided buffer to get all of the ids of the lookups.
We need the ids of the lookups in order to properly upsert the
data to DV.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper_loading.get_buffer_ids
documentation:
Uses the provided buffer to get all of the ids of the entities.
We need the ids of the entities in order to properly upsert the
data to DV.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.sharepoint.load_document
documentation: TODO - review and refactor code

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.sharepoint.get_connection_details
documentation: TODO - Remove dependence on Dataverse system variable, use key vault instead
TODO - Use DVHandler object, instead of passing the url and token

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.security.get_client_credential
documentation: Retruns the credential needed to get the token for access to the Dataverse.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.security.get_dataverse_token
documentation: Returns the token needed for working with the Dataverse API

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.security.get_flow_token
documentation: Return the token needed for accessing power automate flows.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.security.get_graph_token
documentation: TODO - Add parameter to define *which* SharePoint

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer.__init__
documentation:
Buffers for temporarily storing entity information.
Need to use them for the batch reading / writing operations.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer._load_id_params_buffer
documentation:
Loads the buffer for the entity to the buffer for the category.
This buffer is used for a batch query for the ids of the entities.
Resets the entity buffer.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer._load_data_buffer
documentation:
Loads the buffer for the entity to the buffer for the category.
This is the buffer that will be bulk-upserted in the end.
Resets the entity buffer.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer._load_lookup_params_buffer
documentation:
Loads the lookup buffer for the entity, which is a dictionary,
into the lookup buffer for the category. Transforms the dictionary 
to a list, because that's how the the DV Handler requires it.
Resets the entity buffer.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer._load_key_lookup_params_buffer
documentation:
Loads the key-lookup params for the entity into
the key-lookup buffer for the category of data.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer.reset_entity_buffers
documentation:
Resets all buffers for the current entity.
Used in the entity cycle.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer.reset_category_buffers
documentation: Reset all category-level buffers.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.buffer.Buffer.load_buffers
documentation:
Because we will query and upsert the data in batches,
we need to store everything in our buffers.

variables.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.EntityLookupParams
documentation: Used to divide and sort the file loading mappings

variables.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.Category
documentation: Used for storing the id info of the lookup entity

variables.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.Lookup
documentation: Needed because each entity can have several lookups to other entities

classes.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.ResponseIds

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.ResponseIds.append
documentation:
Depending on the status code appends the id and 
table name to the create / update category.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.ResponseIds.merge
documentation:
Merges the values from the provided object onto the
the values of the calling object.

Used as a return value from the upsert operation on the DV.
Contains the table names and ids of the entities that were 
updated and created, stored separately.

classes.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.APIParams
documentation: Basic helper data structure for making API calls.

classes.name: OTCFinUtils.data_structs.IDParams
documentation: A group of parameters used for querying id info of entities.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_segment_response_id
documentation:
From a list of lines of a batch response, returns 
the id of the entity in the response. If a null
id column name is provided, return None.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_segment_status_code
documentation:
From a list of lines of a batch response,
returns the HTTP status code.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_segment_table_name
documentation:
From a list of lines of a batch response,
returns the table name of the entity using regex.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.process_data_type
documentation: Resolves conflicts between file data types and DV data types.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_lookup_column
documentation:
Gets the lookup column value from the 
JSON string in the mapping.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_file_data
documentation:
Get the data from the appropriate file column, 
depending on whether the data matches the "exclude 
values" list from the mapping.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.data_equals_exclude_value
documentation:
Checks if the file data matches one of the 
"exclude values" from the mapping.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.trim_string_values
documentation:
If the value is a string trims and returns it.
Returns all other types of values.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.is_date
documentation: Helper function.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_date_string
documentation: Helper function.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.choice_value
documentation:
Should return the DV value (number) of the choice we need,
based on the file data value.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.normalize_choice_map
documentation:
Should return a normalized dictionary of the mappings,
from the un-normalized list of mappings.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.default_value
documentation:
Extract the default value from a JSON string, 
based on hardcoded rules.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.cast_data
documentation:
Casts the provided value to the given data type.
Return the value if the data type is unknown.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.get_skip_flag
documentation:
Return a flag for whether to skip the current entity or not,
depending on whether the file data matches one of the "exclude 
values" in the mapping or if the file data is an empty value.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.data_is_empty
documentation:
Checks if the file data is an empty cell. Returns True 
if empty. Returns False otherwise. Does not take into 
consideration the alternative file column.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.evaluate_condition
OTCFinUtils.utils.is_valid
documentation: Evaluates if the row satisfies the given condition.

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.group_mappings
documentation:
From all the mapping, return a dictionary of grouped mapping lists,
based on their categories (sheet name + order number + DV table).

functions.name: OTCFinUtils.utils.extract_sheets
documentation:
From the provided categories, returns an ordered list of the sheet names,
based on the map group ordering of the categories.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.sharepoint_client.SharePointClient.list_folder_contents
documentation: Recursive function to browse folders

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler._create_url
documentation: A general helper function. Can be used extensively.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler.get_table_definition
documentation: Returns the table definition information of the given table.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler.get_columns_names
documentation: TODO - review and test this function

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler.get_lookup_details
documentation: TODO - review and test this function

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler.get_choice_details
documentation: TODO - review and test this function

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler.upsert_bulk
documentation:
Executes a bulk upsert operation.
If the data has an id, then update the entity.
If the data has no id, then insert the entity.

If there are more than items than the chunk size, 
splits the operation into multiple batches.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler._upsert_bulk_subset
documentation: Used as a helper function for the main bulk-upsert function.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler._extract_response_ids
documentation:
From the batch response string, returns the ids of the
created / updated entities in a ResponseIds object, only
if the id column names are provided.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler._execute_batch_operation
documentation: A general helper function. Can be used for any type of batch operation.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler._create_batch_item_string
documentation: A helper function for creating the batch request body.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.dataverse_handler.DVHandler.delete_entities
documentation:
A generic function for bulk-deleting entities 
based on the provided list of dictionaries.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper.__init__
documentation:
Because we constantly interact with the DV API.
Need to keep track of the connection information.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._resolve_type_conflicts
documentation: Necessary in the case the file types don't match the DV types.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._table_definition
documentation: Uses a caching approach to minimize number of queries to DV.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._resolve_empty_id_conditions
documentation:
In the case the ID parameter buffer has items with
an empty list of conditions to filter by, add an 
"impossible" condition.

In such cases the not DV should return any entity ID.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._link_ids_with_data
documentation:
For adding the ids to the data buffer.
Necessary for the bulk upsert operation.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._link_lookups
documentation:
For adding the lookups to the data buffer.
Necessary for the bulk upsert operation.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._upsert_data_buffer
documentation: This operation is the ultimate goal of the whole code.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._extract_lookup_vars
documentation:
For increased readability, this logic is 
grouped into one function.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._skip_entity_logic
documentation: In the case we need to skip this entity (there is no entity in the file).

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._lookup_logic
documentation:
Extracts and appends the appropriate lookup parameters to the
entity lookup buffer. 

This buffer will later be loaded to the category buffer.

The category buffer will be used for a bulk-reading of the 
necessary lookup ids.

If no lookup value is found in the file, 
run the skip-entity logic.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._setup_key_parameters
documentation: Loads the parameters for getting the id of the entity based on its key.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._key_logic
documentation:
Has two main steps:

- Extracts and loads the appropriate id parameters in the
  entity id params buffer. This buffer will later be used
  to get the actual DV id of the entity, and not just the
  logical key of the entity.

- Loads the logical key data to the entity data buffer.
  The entity data buffer will later be loaded to the
  category data buffer, which will be bulk-upserted to
  the DV.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._save_key_lookup_column
documentation: For getting the ids later, if some lookups are part of the key.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._key_lookup_logic
documentation:
In the case the mapping is for a lookup and for a key of the entity.
This is one of the most complicated cases. Later we get the id of the
key using the 'expand' option in the DV API.

We don't need to add the file data to the data buffer.
This step is already done in the link-lookups step.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._choice_logic
documentation:
In the case the mapping is for a choice. Assigns 
the DV choice value in the entity buffer. If the
file field is empty, does not add anything to the
data buffer.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._default_value_logic
documentation: In the case the mapping is for a default value.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._default_value_key_logic
documentation: If the mapping defines a default value and if this field is part of the entity key.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._normal_data_logic
documentation:
The simplest case - just map the file data to the data buffer.
No modifications to the data are necessary.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._run_mapping_cycle
documentation:
Checks the current type of mapping and calls the corresponding 
function for each type of mapping.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._link_table_metadata
documentation:
Because we need the metadata (the table name and id column)
for correctly upserting the data.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._run_entity_cycle
documentation:
Resets all required buffers before everything else.

For the entity of the specified category, in the given row, implements 
all associated mappings. 

Loads all associated entity buffer data into the category buffers. 

Skips the loading steps if the mapping code has marked the entity as 
a skip-entity.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._create_key_lookup_condition
documentation: Helper function, for creating the DV API query filter parameter.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._attach_entity_lookups_to_buffer
documentation: So we can get the id of the entity, based on all its key-fields.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._attach_lookups_to_buffer
documentation:
Adds the filtering conditions for the key-
lookup fields, so we can get the entity id.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._process_lookups
documentation:
Because we need the lookup-fields to be 
upserted as well.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._process_ids
documentation:
Because we need the ids to upserted as 
well - for the entities that exist.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._process_buffered_data
documentation:
Because we need the lookups and ids to 
be added to the loading data.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._link_data_owner
documentation:
Add the "global" account id as the owner 
for all buffered entity data.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._postprocess_data
documentation:
Because we need to add missing data and 
execute clean ups before upserting.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper._load_sheet
documentation:
Gets the sheet metadata and runs the loading 
process for the given sheet. Returns the ids 
of the updated and created entities.

methods.name: OTCFinUtils.mapper.DataMapper.map_data
documentation:
Prepare mappings, categories, and sheet names. Run the 
mappings for each sheet. Return the ids of the updated 
and created entities, grouped by table names.
TODO - Add sheet name to parameter list - not needed anymore?
TODO - Remove table name and sheet name from categories - not needed anymore?
